[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0000000000 a
1 0000000000 a
2 0000000000 a
3 0000000000 a
4 0000000000 a
5 0000000000 a
6 0000010001 2
7 0000010001 2

01 10 0000010001 2 match 6 7
12 21 0000010001 2 match 6 7
23 32 1010011001 5
34 43 1010011000 4
45 54 1000111000 4
56 65 1001010110 5
67 76 1000010110 4
70 07 1000011100 4

02 20 1000011101 5
13 31 0000010001 2 match 6 7
24 42 1010011000 4
35 53 1100011011 6
46 64 1000010000 2

71 17 0000010000 1
